channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Two Killed After Vehicle Plunges Into Sebakwe River Along Harare–Masvingo Road
item.description: By A Correspondent | ZimEye | Two people have died while two others were injured following a tragic road traffic... Continue reading "Two Killed After Vehicle Plunges Into Sebakwe River Along Harare–Masvingo Road" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Three Men Jailed After Fatal Assault on Nephew @263Chat
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera Three Inyathi men have each been sentenced to three years in prison after they were convicted of culpable homicide for fatally assaulting their nephew, Dumisani Nunu (27). In a statement, the National Prosecuting Authority of Zimbabwe (NPAZ) said Mzimkhulu Mthombeni (44), Masotsha [...] The post Three Men Jailed After Fatal Assault on Nephew appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Citizens Struggle Not Over
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| Opposition politician Gift Ostallos Siziba has insisted that the campaign for political change in Zimbabwe remains active, saying... Continue reading "Citizens Struggle Not Over" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: High Court Upholds Phoenix Prince Mine Boundary Ruling @263Chat
item.description: By Staff Reporter A legal dispute over mining boundaries in Bindura has intensified after the High Court dismissed an appeal by Side Electrical (Private) Limited trading as Botha Mine clearing the way for the enforcement of a magistrates’ court order requiring rival mining companies to [...] The post High Court Upholds Phoenix Prince Mine Boundary Ruling appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Electoral Reforms Will Deliver Faster, Fairer Elections: Kandishaya @263Chat @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera Zanu PF deputy national Political Commissar for the Youth League, Taurai Kandishaya has defended the Government’s proposed electoral reforms saying they are intended to improve the management of elections, strengthen voter registration and reduce disputes that have characterised previous polls. Speaking in [...] The post Electoral Reforms Will Deliver Faster, Fairer Elections: Kandishaya appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: ZCTU Reinstates Secretary-General, Declares Suspension Unconstitutional @263Chat
item.description: By Tinomudaishe Muzanenhamo The Zimbabwe Congress of Trade Unions (ZCTU) General Council has overturned the suspension of Secretary-General Tirivanhu Marimo ruling that the federation’s National Executive Committee (NEC) acted outside its constitutional mandate. The decision, made during a General Council meeting on Monday marks a [...] The post ZCTU Reinstates Secretary-General, Declares Suspension Unconstitutional appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Questions Emerge as King Misuzulu Holds Secret Meeting With Mnangagwa
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| Zulu King Misuzulu kaZwelithini held a closed-door meeting with President Emmerson Mnangagwa at State House in Harare during... Continue reading "Questions Emerge as King Misuzulu Holds Secret Meeting With Mnangagwa" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Government Commissions Over 30 Vehicles for Reparations Department
item.description: Government Commissions Over 30 Vehicles for Reparations Department The newly established Reparations Department has received a major operational boost after Government unveiled a fleet of more than 30 vehicles to support its work across Zimbabwe. The Government says the new vehicles will improve mobility and help officers deliver services more efficiently, particularly in rural communities. [...] The post Government Commissions Over 30 Vehicles for Reparations Department appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: UN Women Seeks Civil Society Input for New Five-Year Gender Equality Strategy @263Chat
item.description: By Shalom Shawurwa UN Women Zimbabwe has begun consultations on a new five-year strategic plan inviting civil society organisations to help shape policies and programmes aimed at advancing gender equality and empowering women and girls across the country. The strategy, which will guide the organisation’s [...] The post UN Women Seeks Civil Society Input for New Five-Year Gender Equality Strategy appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Kazembe hails Mnangagwa as a ’true constitutionalist’ @bulawayo24
item.description: HOME Affairs and Cultural Heritage Minister Kazembe Kazembe has described President Emmerson Mnangagwa as a committed constitutionalist, saying the recent constitutional reforms demonstrate his admini... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Sibanda challenges Constitution Amendment No. 3 in ConCourt @bulawayo24
item.description: Former Binga North legislator and lawyer Prince Dubeko Sibanda has filed an application in the Constitutional Court seeking to have key provisions of the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Act... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: South Africa traditional leaders denounce xenophobic attacks @bulawayo24
item.description: A delegation of South African traditional leaders has used a visit to Zimbabwe to condemn xenophobia, saying migration-related challenges should be resolved through dialogue rather than violence.The d... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Why Zimbabwe hosting CIMAM 2026 is a bigger deal than it looks @3menonaboat
item.description:
We present 5 reasons why CIMAM 2026 in Harare is not just "nice cultural news"

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
